# Pattern Template

Use this template for files under `docs/patterns/`.


## Problem

Describe the real production problem this pattern solves.

## Pattern

Describe the reusable architecture/approach. Include the “shape” (inputs, boundaries, outputs).

## Tradeoffs

- (what you gain, what you pay)

## Failure Modes

- (how it breaks in production)

## Operational Checks

- (guardrails, alerts, validation steps)

## Real Use Case

A concrete scenario.
